title: Endpoint Collection and Flushing Flow
interaction_flow: FrameworkRequest → LaravelIntegration: HTTP request triggers Router::dispatch() hook
ShmCacheMap → DDTraceExtension: return bool (true if last_endpoints_push.elapsed() < 30min)
DDTraceExtension → SidecarActionsBuffer: ddog_sidecar_telemetry_addEndpoint_buffer(buffer, method, path, operation_name, resource_name)
SidecarTransport → ShmCacheMap: blocking::enqueue_actions() → updates last_endpoints_push timestamp
EndpointCatalog → EndpointCatalog: getCacheDir($container) → reads kernel.cache_dir parameter
EndpointCatalog → EndpointCatalog: fromRouterCache($cacheDir) → require url_generating_routes.php + url_matching_routes.php
EndpointCatalog → SymfonyIntegration: return array[{path, operationName, resourceName, method}]
FrameworkRequest → RootSpanData: set meta[http.route] / meta[http.endpoint] / meta[http.url] / meta[http.method]

method_signatures.rust_are_endpoints_collected: ddog_sidecar_telemetry_are_endpoints_collected(cache: &mut ShmCacheMap, service: CharSlice, env: CharSlice): bool

key_relationships: LaravelIntegration depends_on DDTraceExtension (are_endpoints_collected, add_endpoint, flush_endpoints, root_span)
EndpointCatalog reads Symfony router cache files (url_generating_routes.php, url_matching_routes.php)
business_rules: Endpoints are only collected ONCE per service/env per 30-minute window (checked via ShmCacheMap TTL)
Collection guard: are_endpoints_collected() must return false before any add_endpoint/flush_endpoints calls
flush_endpoints() must be called once after batching all add_endpoint() calls
Laravel: iterates all registered routes, builds resourceName as '$method $path'
Symfony: uses EndpointCatalog which first tries router cache (memoized), falls back to live RouteCollection
HTTP method priority: GET > POST > first available (default GET if none)
Symfony: only collects for versions >= 5.x (skips Symfony 4.x via strpos check)
Endpoint fallback sampling: http.route > http.endpoint > computed from http.url
404 responses are NOT sampled even when http.endpoint is set
Root span meta tags used for endpoint-based sampling: http.route, http.endpoint, http.url, http.method
EndpointCatalog is memoized (static $memo) for the life of the request

integration_trigger_points.Laravel: Illuminate\Routing\Router::dispatch() tracing hook (posthook after route resolution)
integration_trigger_points.Symfony: EventDispatcher::dispatch() tracing hook (handles kernel.request / kernel.controller events)

important_notes: This is Datadog PHP tracer (ddtrace) auto-discovery of HTTP endpoints for telemetry. The PHP extension exposes are_endpoints_collected/add_endpoint/flush_endpoints as C-extension functions. The Rust sidecar maintains a shared-memory cache (ShmCacheMap) so endpoint catalog is only sent once per 30 minutes per service+env combination. The root_span() function returns the RootSpanData for the active trace stack, used separately for per-request HTTP metadata tagging.
